name: DetailRow
description: A key↔value row: a muted label on the left, a value on the right with an optional sub-line beneath it. A hairline bottom border (override to none on the last row). Owns its full style — references tokens only.
whenToUse: A line in a summary/details list (review, confirmation, receipt, spec sheet). Compose via a Ref, mapping label/value/sub to host fields; set style.borderBottom = "none" on the final row.
